case_title: UNITED CALIFORNIA GLASS & DOOR VS. CT CORPORATION SYSTEM et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF AMENDING/TO CORRECT DEFENDANT'S NAME FROM C.T. CORP TO PHARMACA INTEGRATIVE PHARMACY FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED CALIFORNIA GLASS & DOOR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-27-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-27-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY HAROLD TICKIN--MANAGER. DEFENDANTS RETAIL HANDYMAN AND PHARMACA INTEGRATIVE WERE REPRESENTED BY DOUG G. DOHER WHO APPEARED BY COURT CALL. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,720.00 FILED BY UNITED CALIFORNIA GLASS & DOOR AS TO DEFENDANT CT CORPORATION SYSTEM RETAIL HANDYMAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-27-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
